title: Cedar Hills — Coming Soon teaser
body: Coming soon in Beaverton: a light-filled 4-bed on Cedar Hills Dr with a primary on main and greenspace out back. Be first in line — reply for a private preview before it hits the market.

title: Cedar Hills — Instagram carousel
body: Just listed energy ✨ 1248 NW Cedar Hills Dr | 4BR · 3BA · 2,580 sqft | Beaverton. Swipe for the kitchen. Private tours opening this week — DM us.

title: Cedar Hills — Open house flyer
body: OPEN HOUSE · 1248 NW Cedar Hills Dr, Beaverton · $845,000 · 4 bed / 3 bath / 2,580 sqft · Primary on main, 3-car garage, backs to greenspace. Hosted by Chase Bright, Matin Real Estate.

title: Cedar Hills — Single property page
body: A calm, modern Beaverton home where everyday life flows easily — open great room, quartz kitchen, and a primary suite on the main level. Full gallery, map, and tour request inside.

title: Spring Seller — What's your home worth?
body: Homes near you are moving fast this spring. Curious what yours could fetch today? Get a no-pressure home value and a same-week market report — it takes 30 seconds.

title: Spring Seller — Market update reel
body: Portland metro sellers: inventory is tight and days-on-market is down to 17. If you've thought about listing, this is the window. Tap to see your home's number.

title: Cash Offer — Meta lead ad
body: Skip the showings. Get a competitive cash offer on your Portland-area home in 48 hours — and compare it side-by-side with what a traditional sale could net you.

title: Cash Offer — Net sheet explainer
body: Here's exactly what a cash offer looks like next to a market sale: price, fees, timeline, and your estimated net — no guesswork, no obligation.

title: Just Sold — Lake Oswego post
body: SOLD in Lake Oswego 🔑 Another happy seller, another smooth close. Thinking about your move? We'd love to do the same for you.

title: Just Sold — Neighborhood mailer
body: We just sold a home on your street. Want to know what that means for your value? Scan the code for an instant estimate from Matin Real Estate.

title: Open House Weekend — Buyer invite
body: Three open houses this weekend matched to your saved searches. Bring your questions (and your pre-approval) — we'll have the coffee ready.

title: Price Reduction — Saved search alert
body: Good news on a home you saved: the price just dropped. It now fits your budget — want to see it before the weekend rush?

title: Past Client — Anniversary touch
body: It's been a while since we handed you the keys — and your equity has likely grown. Here's a quick snapshot of your home's value today, just because.

title: Recruiting — Careers landing page
body: Top producers run on MatinOS: AI speed-to-lead, automated listing launches, and a coordinator team that handles the paperwork. Keep more of your deals. See how we work.
